title: ACDC Transformation Schema
description: Defines Transformations that compose Methods with Concepts. A Transformation binds domain concepts to method input/output roles, optionally constraining them with named slices and method configurations. Aligned with Sheet 5 of ACDC_Model_Diagrams.drawio.

description.description: Human-readable description of this transformation library.

$references.description: Pointers to referenced model files (DC concepts, AC concepts, methods, etc.).

configurationOptions.description: Global catalogue of configuration option sets available to transformations.

roleDefinitions.description: Registry of SmartPhrase roles with context source (endpoint-driven vs manual) and declarative triggers for implicit phrase matching.

smartPhrases.description: Reusable phrase templates that compose into human-readable analysis descriptions.

derivationTransformations.description: Transformations that derive new variables from source data or other derivations.

analysisTransformations.description: Transformations that produce statistical analysis results.

transformations.description: All transformations (when not split by type).

Transformation.description: An applied analysis or derivation that composes a Method with Concepts via Bindings. Dimensions are expressed through bindings with dataStructureRole 'dimension', not as a separate field.

oid.description: Unique identifier for this transformation (e.g. T.ChangeFromBaseline).

transformationType.description: Whether this transformation derives a new variable or produces analysis results.

composedPhrase.description: Human-readable phrase template with {placeholder} tokens, composed from SmartPhrases.

instanceOf.description: The concept this transformation instantiates (DC concept OID for derivations, AC concept OID for analyses).

usesMethod.description: The method OID this transformation applies (e.g. M.Subtraction, M.ANCOVA).

bindings.description: Concrete bindings of concepts to method input/output roles. Dimensions are bindings with dataStructureRole 'dimension'.

slices.description: Named dimensional constraints (e.g. 'baseline' slice fixing AnalysisVisit to 'Baseline').

validSmartPhrases.description: SmartPhrase OIDs that can compose a description for this transformation.

methodConfigurations.description: Method configuration overrides specific to this transformation.

Binding.description: Links a concept to a method role with direction and structural role. The dataStructureRole indicates whether the bound concept serves as a measure, dimension, or attribute in this transformation.

concept.description: Concept OID or name being bound (e.g. C.Measure, C.Change, Subject, AnalysisVisit).

methodRole.description: The method input role or output class this concept is bound to (e.g. response, minuend, difference).

direction.description: Whether this binding supplies input to the method or captures its output.

dataStructureRole.description: The structural role of this concept: measure (the value being computed/analysed), dimension (grouping/partitioning context), or attribute (descriptive metadata).

slice.description: Reference to a named slice that constrains this binding (e.g. 'baseline').

qualifierType.description: Qualifier type from shared qualifier vocabulary.

requiredValueType.description: Required FHIR/data type for the bound concept (e.g. Quantity, CodeableConcept).

Slice.description: A named cross-section of the data cube that fixes one or more dimensions to specific values (W3C QB SliceKey pattern). Bindings reference slices by name.

dimension.description: The dimension being constrained (e.g. AnalysisVisit, Parameter).

value.description: The constraint value — may be a literal (e.g. 'Baseline') or a {placeholder} for study-level resolution (e.g. '{parameter}').

constraints.description: Dimension constraints that define this slice.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this slice represents.

TransformationConfiguration.description: An override of a method configuration parameter specific to this transformation.

configurationName.description: Name of the method configuration being overridden (must match a Configuration.name in the referenced method).

value.description: The value to set for this configuration.

description.description: Why this configuration is set to this value for this transformation.

RoleDefinitions.description: Registry of SmartPhrase roles. Declares each role's label, its display order within SmartPhrase composition, and a contextSource classifying whether the role is typically supplied by an endpoint spec ('endpoint') or directly by the user ('manual').

order.description: Display order for roles in the SmartPhrase palette.

roles.description: Keyed by role name. Each entry describes one role.

RoleDefinition.description: Describes a single SmartPhrase role: what it means (label) and how it is typically supplied (contextSource). App-specific predicates for implicit role satisfaction are not part of this metadata — they live in app-local config outside the transformation library.

contextSource.description: Who typically supplies the value for this role: 'endpoint' means it is derived from an endpoint spec; 'manual' means the user picks it directly.

SmartPhrase.description: A reusable phrase template that composes into human-readable analysis descriptions.

oid.description: Unique identifier for this SmartPhrase (e.g. SP_CFB_ENDPOINT).

role.description: The compositional role this phrase plays in a full analysis description.

phrase_template.description: Template string with {placeholder} tokens (e.g. 'change from baseline in {parameter}').

configurations.description: Configuration keys whose values fill the template placeholders.

references.description: Concept or method OIDs this phrase relates to.
